title: MGN 582 (F) Amendment 1 ILO work in fishing convention, 2007 - financial security
body: "This notice should be read with the Merchant Shipping (Work in Fishing Convention) Regulations 2018 and replaces MGN 582 (F).  Amendment 1 updates references only.  Notice to   fishing vessel owners operators and managers employers of fishermen skippers officers and fishermen on fishing vessels  "
